line_style: 写意毛笔+飞白枯笔,1-2px主笔+0.3px细节
render: 宣纸水墨+淡彩渲染,xuan-paper texture
lighting: 散射光+留白负空间,低对比柔和
prompt_keywords: Chinese xuan-paper ink wash painting, expressive brush strokes, minimalist composition with negative space, vermilion seal accents, ethereal supernatural atmosphere, calligraphic line quality
negative_keywords: thick oil painting, 3d render, photorealistic, heavy shadows, western style, cyberpunk, neon

fp_examples.action: 书生在烛光下翻阅古籍,窗外仙影飘过
书生盘膝而坐,面前墨迹化为符箓升空
书生挥毫泼墨,朱砂符箓镇压妖灵
书生化为一缕墨烟,融入云海深处

prompt_example: A scholar in flowing robes reads ancient texts by candlelight in a traditional study, an ethereal spirit form drifting past the window, expressive ink-wash brush strokes on xuan-paper texture, minimalist composition with generous negative space, vermilion seal accents, ethereal supernatural atmosphere --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 墨韵·东方灵异
✅ 允许场景: 书院/禅房/竹林/云海/月庭 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 现代都市/血腥/赛博朋克/西方哥特
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',本风格偏写意空灵非暗黑
氛围: 空灵诡谲,留白写意
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. This style is ethereal ink-wash, NOT dark horror. Use minimalist composition with negative space, vermilion accents. Do NOT use 'rainy ancient mansion', modern cities, or cyberpunk.
meta_prompt: Chinese xuan-paper ink wash painting, expressive calligraphic brush strokes, minimalist negative space, vermilion seal accents, ethereal supernatural atmosphere, soft diffused lighting

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 文化研究者·深度解读志怪
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 专家级变体风格, 延续志怪解读深度

reader_constraint.reader_state: 文化探索者·期待志怪变体表达
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 水墨变体+志怪符号+东方神秘

visual_frequency.HF: 符箓变体/妖物核心/朱砂印记(高频符号锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 水墨晕染变体/衣袂/山石(中频意境)
visual_frequency.LF: 留白/远山/雾气(低频禅意)
visual_frequency.progression: HF朱砂点睛破墨色, MF水墨变体造意境, LF留白生禅意
